title: Building Blocks
description: Mod that adds plenty of new building blocks that you can use to build anything you want.
body:
Building Blocks

CookieCraft Bulding Blocks is all about good looking building blocks and also some food and furniture. For example if you want to build a house with white ceiling on first floor and wooden floor on second, you can use our blocks to do it without using 2 layers of blocks!

features:

- Over 10 new wood and leaves kinds

- Lot of new bricks and walls

- Over 200 double-sided blocks

- 3 New plants type

- Over 10 new drinks and food
